title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
